title: erysimum longifolium var. leucophaeum
intro: Erysimum longifolium var. leucophaeum, also known as white wallflower, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Erysimum longifolium var. leucophaeum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and ointments to treat various ailments.
